step_1_scanned_metadata.principal_investigator: Budd Hopkins and Ted Bloecher; Dr. Franklin, Dr. Aphrodite ClaMar
step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: Steven Kilburn, a university student, experienced an abduction in 1973 while driving a remote highway between Baltimore and an unspecified location. Under hypnosis, he recalled his car being pulled off the road by a magnetic force. He encountered four or five hairless, skinny humanoids with large black eyes and whitish, putty-like skin, wearing tight black suits. These beings, who communicated via gestures, dug a hole near his car. He was then taken aboard a luminous white, egg-shaped craft, where he underwent an examination in a rounded, glowing room. During the examination, a device ran a needle-like instrument along his back, and other rod-like and clamp-like devices were used on his body. The beings seemed to instruct him not to reveal his experience. He lost consciousness and later found himself driving home, feeling watched and dirty.

encounter_events.source_citation: retained fragmentary memories of seeing something in the sky and of standing outside his car.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness retained fragmentary conscious memories of the experience prior to hypnosis, matching A116.1 (fragmentary memories persist).

encounter_events.source_citation: He also felt a strange sense of uneasiness whenever he passed the same stretch of road.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness feels alarmed when passing a certain place, matching A112 (witness feels alarmed on passing a certain place).

encounter_events.source_citation: He felt a foreboding that something would happen if he stopped
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness sensed something would happen before it did, matching E208 (premonition).

encounter_events.source_citation: his car suddenly veered off the road as if pulled by a magnet
encounter_events.ai_justification: The car was pulled off the road by an external force, matching E410 (UFO or beings take control of vehicle).

encounter_events.source_citation: when he got out he saw a light all over the area.
encounter_events.ai_justification: An ambient light covering the entire area behaves in an unusual way, matching E125 (light behaves in odd way).

encounter_events.source_citation: A sound like leather rubbing together attracted his attention
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness hears a monotonous or unusual sound associated with the beings' approach, matching U530 (buzzing, humming or other monotonous sound).

encounter_events.source_citation: four or five beings who apparently came over a fence along the roadside and approached him
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as humanoids, matching B201 (humanoid).

encounter_events.source_citation: at which time he was unable to move.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness was paralyzed upon the beings' approach, matching E315 (paralysis, numbness).

encounter_events.source_citation: The beings were hairless humanoids
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as hairless, matching B295 (hair absent).

encounter_events.source_citation: heads like inverted teardrops
encounter_events.ai_justification: Inverted teardrop heads with pointed chin and large cranium match B233 (head egg or pear shaped, with pointed chin, large cranium).

encounter_events.source_citation: large black walnut-shaped eyes
encounter_events.ai_justification: The eyes are described as large, matching B241 (large size eyes).

encounter_events.source_citation: large black walnut-shaped eyes
encounter_events.ai_justification: The eyes are entirely dark/black, matching B243 (eyes entirely dark).

encounter_events.source_citation: walnut-shaped eyes
encounter_events.ai_justification: Walnut-shaped eyes are oval in form, matching B242 (shape wraparound, catlike, oval).

encounter_events.source_citation: small nose
encounter_events.ai_justification: A small nose matches B252 (nose absent or diminutive).

encounter_events.source_citation: slit mouth
encounter_events.ai_justification: A slit mouth matches B258 (mouth slitlike, lips thin).

encounter_events.source_citation: no ears
encounter_events.ai_justification: Absence of ears matches B254 (ears close against head, absent, or holes only).

encounter_events.source_citation: The skin was whitish and putty-like
encounter_events.ai_justification: Whitish putty-like skin matches B290 (skin white, gray, ashen or claylike).

encounter_events.source_citation: the height below his shoulder
encounter_events.ai_justification: Below the shoulder of a man in his early 20s suggests approximately 4-5 feet, matching B221 (moderately short).

encounter_events.source_citation: The beings were extraordinarily skinny, with no muscular definition and an apparent weight of 50 lbs.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Extraordinarily skinny with no muscular definition matches B225 (spindly build, slight musculature).

encounter_events.source_citation: fingers were tubelike
encounter_events.ai_justification: Tubelike fingers match B284 (fingers balloon-like), the closest semantic match for unusually shaped cylindrical digits.

encounter_events.source_citation: Movement was clumsy and stiff, as if the beings hobbled.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Clumsy, stiff, hobbling movement matches B504 (beings move in a clumsy, stiff or crippled fashion).

encounter_events.source_citation: They wore black, tight-fitting suits
encounter_events.ai_justification: Black clothing matches B366 (black).

encounter_events.source_citation: tight-fitting suits
encounter_events.ai_justification: Tight-fitting suits match B301 (tight-fitting).

encounter_events.source_citation: gloves of a leatherlike material
encounter_events.ai_justification: Gloves match B317 (gloves).

encounter_events.source_citation: gloves of a leatherlike material
encounter_events.ai_justification: Leatherlike material matches B307 (leather-like).

encounter_events.source_citation: One being began digging a hole
encounter_events.ai_justification: Digging a hole suggests gathering samples from the environment, matching B650 (gather samples).

encounter_events.source_citation: another, who seemed to be the boss, gave directions by gesture.
encounter_events.ai_justification: One being acting as boss and giving directions matches B800 (one being acts as leader, spokesman).

encounter_events.source_citation: gave directions by gesture.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Communication by gesture matches C105 (communication by sign language or gestures).

encounter_events.source_citation: A dispute broke out between the boss and another being about where to dig
encounter_events.ai_justification: A dispute between beings matches B807 (democratic enough to confer, tolerate disputes).

encounter_events.source_citation: He felt fear at first, but then became oddly calm
encounter_events.ai_justification: Becoming oddly calm despite the frightening situation matches E300 (pacification effect: witness calm, euphoric, relaxed).

encounter_events.source_citation: A clamplike device seized him by the shoulders, causing him pain in the back.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A clamp-like device controlling the witness matches E325 (control by devices or injection).

encounter_events.source_citation: a luminous white, egg-shaped 'saucer' sitting on a platform
encounter_events.ai_justification: An egg-shaped craft matches U102 (oval or egg shape).

encounter_events.source_citation: sitting on a platform of risers
encounter_events.ai_justification: A platform of risers supporting the craft matches U134 (landing gear).

encounter_events.source_citation: making a humming sound
encounter_events.ai_justification: A humming sound from the craft matches U530 (witness hears a buzzing, humming or other monotonous sound).

encounter_events.source_citation: The beings escorted him up a ramp
encounter_events.ai_justification: A ramp into the craft matches U133 (ramps, stairs).

encounter_events.source_citation: through a tubelike passageway
encounter_events.ai_justification: A tubelike passageway matches U201 (tunnel, passageway).

encounter_events.source_citation: changed directions as though the beings did not know where to go in their own ship
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings not knowing where to go in their own ship indicates fallibility, matching B758 (indications of fallibility).

encounter_events.source_citation: He entered a white room
encounter_events.ai_justification: A white room matches U220 (white).

encounter_events.source_citation: rounded and domed and seemingly without an angle
encounter_events.ai_justification: A rounded, domed room without sharp edges matches U212 (round, domed, without sharp edges).

encounter_events.source_citation: glowing with a misty luminosity
encounter_events.ai_justification: Misty luminosity matches U231 (bright and misty).

encounter_events.source_citation: He entered a white room, rounded and domed
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room where the examination takes place is the examination room, matching U202 (examination room).

encounter_events.source_citation: Though he did not remember undressing, he next found himself seated on a table wearing only a diaper-like cloth.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness was undressed without remembering it, matching X100 (witness undresses or is undressed).

encounter_events.source_citation: wearing only a diaper-like cloth
encounter_events.ai_justification: Clothing replaced with a diaper-like cloth matches X105 (clothing replaced with robe, smock or other garment).

encounter_events.source_citation: he next found himself seated on a table / he laid down on the table
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness is on an examining table, matching X155 (witness lies on an examining table or couch).

encounter_events.source_citation: A large and intricate device like a planetarium projector came down from the ceiling and ran a needle-like device along his back.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A large device descending from the ceiling to scan the witness matches X225 (eyelike device descends from ceiling and scans witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: Two beings seemed in control of the examination while others waited in the room.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Two beings directing the examination matches B802 (one being or two acts as examiner, doctor, or director).

encounter_events.source_citation: first the two beings, then the device once again, examined his back
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings examining the witness by touch matches X210 (beings touch witness in various places, as if examining).

encounter_events.source_citation: apparently testing nerves and reflexes
encounter_events.ai_justification: Testing nerves and reflexes indicates interest in the nervous system, matching B716 (interest in nervous system).

encounter_events.source_citation: apparently testing nerves and reflexes
encounter_events.ai_justification: Testing reflexes matches X244 (beings test the witness's reflexes).

encounter_events.source_citation: The temperature of the room ranged from normal to chilly until one point when a warm and pleasant light shone down on him.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room changing from cold to warm matches U257 (room changes from cold to warm).

encounter_events.source_citation: a warm and pleasant light shone down on him
encounter_events.ai_justification: A light shining down on the witness during examination matches X224 (light or light beam shines on witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: He assumed various positions on his stomach, back and side as the beings examined him all over.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Being moved into various positions (stomach, back, side) matches X215 (beings flex or contort limbs of the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: the beings applied a claMplike device to his hip region
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings use a handheld clamp-like instrument on the witness's hip region, matching X220 (beings use handheld instruments, clamps).

encounter_events.source_citation: poked his stoMach with a rod
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings use a rod-like probe on the witness's stomach, matching X221 (beings use probes or electrodes connected to other machinery).

encounter_events.source_citation: they flexed his legs with another rodlike device
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings flex or contort the limbs of the witness, matching X215 (beings flex or contort limbs of the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: The beings assured hiM that he had nothing to fear
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings promise the subject will be safe, matching M100 (promise subject will be safe, that they are peaceful).

encounter_events.source_citation: seeMed to instruct hiM not to reveal his experience
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings instruct the witness to keep the experience secret, matching M118 (beings swear the subject to secrecy).

encounter_events.source_citation: he felt that they did not care that they hurt hiM
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings behave in a cold, indifferent, insensitive manner toward the witness's pain, matching B905.

encounter_events.source_citation: they did not like for hiM to look at theM
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings dislike for the witness to watch them, matching B909.

encounter_events.source_citation: The witness lost consciousness<?>
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness loses consciousness, matching E202 (witness unconscious and immobilized).

encounter_events.source_citation: then found hiMself ing hoMe with a sense of being watched
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness finds himself traveling home unawares, matching E205 (relocation: witness travels a distance unawares).

encounter_events.source_citation: with a sense of being watched
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness feels pursued or anxious without knowing why, matching A110.

encounter_events.source_citation: he felt dirty and in need of a bath
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness feels unclean and in need of a bath after the encounter, matching A113.

encounter_events.source_citation: No traffic seeMed to pass on the road during the course of the abduction, and no one investigated his car on the side of the road.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The absence of traffic and outside observers during the abduction implies a vacuum/isolation effect, matching E100 (vacuum effect: stillness, silence) and the broader isolation context.
